Toss 1 oz pumpkin seeds with olive oil, cumin, chili, and salt. Roast at 325F for 15 min.
Blend 1/2 cup blueberries, 3/4 cup plain yogurt, 1 tsp honey, and 1/4 cup milk until smooth.
Mix oats, honey, almonds, pumpkin seeds, dried cranberries, and a pinch of salt. Press into pan and bake 20 min at 325F.
Thread cherry tomatoes, mini mozzarella balls, and fresh basil on toothpicks. Drizzle with olive oil and balsamic glaze.
Blend 1 ripe avocado, 2 tbsp cocoa powder, 3 tbsp maple syrup, 1/4 cup almond milk, and pinch of salt until smooth.
Blend 1 medium zucchini, 2 tbsp tahini, garlic, lemon juice, olive oil, salt. Serve with veggie sticks.
Mix oats, peanut butter, protein powder, honey, and chocolate chips. Roll into balls. Refrigerate 30 min.
Cube watermelon and crumble feta on top. Thread on toothpicks and finish with a mint leaf.
Blend soaked cashews with lemon, garlic, herbs, and water to smooth consistency. Serve with sliced veggies or crackers.
Blend cooked beetroot, chickpeas, tahini, lemon, garlic. Serve with carrot sticks, cucumber, and celery.
Toss almonds in egg white, honey, cinnamon, and vanilla. Bake at 300F for 20 min, stirring halfway.
Combine diced mango, pineapple, papaya, kiwi, and a squeeze of lime juice. Top with shredded coconut.
Fill small whole-wheat tortilla with 1 oz shredded cheese, black beans, and salsa. Warm in pan and cut into wedges.
Slice 1 banana. Dip each piece in melted dark chocolate. Freeze 30 min on parchment until set.
Air-pop 3 cups popcorn. Toss with 2 tbsp nutritional yeast, olive oil spray, garlic powder, and salt.
Top cucumber rounds with 1/2 oz smoked salmon, cream cheese, and a caper. Garnish with dill.

Recipe_Name: Black Bean Dip with Corn Chips
Instructions: Blend black beans, garlic, lime, cumin, cilantro. Serve with 1 oz baked corn chips.
Blend 1 tbsp almond butter, 1 tbsp cocoa, 1 frozen banana, 1 cup almond milk, and shredded coconut.
Serve 3 tbsp tzatziki with 1 small whole-wheat pita cut into triangles. Garnish with paprika.
Drain chickpeas, dry well. Toss in olive oil, popcorn salt, garlic powder. Roast at 425F for 25-30 min.
Fill 3 large butter lettuce leaves with sliced deli turkey, avocado slices, and a drizzle of honey mustard.
Juice 3 carrots with a knob of fresh ginger, 1 apple, and lemon juice. Stir and serve over ice.
Mix oats, sunflower butter, honey, raisins, and chia seeds. Roll into balls. Refrigerate until firm.
Arrange 1 oz sharp cheddar cubes, 1/2 cup red grapes, and 3 whole-grain crackers on a small plate.
Toss edamame in olive oil, sriracha, garlic, and sea salt. Roast at 400F for 15 min.
Blend 1 cup honeydew, 1/2 cup spinach, 1/2 cup Greek yogurt, a squeeze of lime, and ice.
Pit 5 Medjool dates and stuff each with a whole roasted almond. Optionally drizzle with dark chocolate.
Brush nori sheets with sesame oil. Sprinkle with sea salt and sesame seeds. Bake at 300F for 10 min. Break into crisps.
Layer 3/4 cup plain Greek yogurt, 2 tbsp low-sugar granola, and 1 tbsp mixed seeds in a cup.
Mix 1.5 oz tuna with sriracha, light mayo. Spread on 2 plain rice cakes. Top with sliced green onion.
Combine 3/4 cup cottage cheese with 1/2 cup fresh pineapple chunks and a sprinkle of cinnamon.
Mix 1 cup oats, 3 tbsp honey, 2 tbsp almond butter, 1 tbsp each chocolate chips and dried cranberries. Press into pan. Chill 1 hour.
Dice 1/2 mango and 1/2 avocado. Mix with red onion, cilantro, lime juice, and jalapeno. Serve with baked tortilla chips.
Blend 3/4 cup cold brew concentrate, 1 scoop protein powder, 1/2 cup almond milk, and ice. Sweeten with 1 tsp maple syrup.
Mix 2 tbsp pistachios, 1 tbsp dried cranberries, 1 tbsp dark chocolate chips. Bind with 1 tsp honey.

Recipe_Name: Sweet Potato Toast with Almond Butter
Instructions: Slice sweet potato lengthwise and toast until tender. Top with 1 tbsp almond butter and sliced banana.
Boil edamame. Toss with reduced-sodium soy sauce, sesame oil, and a pinch of red pepper flakes.
Grate 1 cooked beet. Mix with 1 tbsp walnuts, 1 tsp olive oil, lemon juice, and fresh parsley.
Blend chickpeas, cocoa, honey, vanilla, almond milk, and almond butter. Serve with strawberries and apple slices for dipping.
Spread 1 tbsp cream cheese on 3 slices deli turkey. Roll up with a slice of cucumber and a few spinach leaves.
Combine sunflower seeds, pumpkin seeds, almonds, honey. Spread on parchment. Bake at 325F for 15 min. Cool and break into pieces.
Melt 2 oz dark chocolate. Stir in 2 tbsp chopped almonds and 1 tbsp oats. Drop spoonfuls onto parchment. Sprinkle with flaky sea salt. Refrigerate until set.
